component.name: IrScrutinizer
component.summary: Powerful program for capturing, generating, analyzing, importing, and exporting of infrared (IR) signals

description.p: IrScrutinizer is a powerful program for capturing, generating, analyzing, importing and exporting infrared (IR) signals.

For capturing and sending IR signals several different hardware sensors and senders are supported. IR Signals can be imported not only by capturing from one of the supported hardware sensors (among others: IrWidget, Global Caché, and Arduino), but also from a number of different file formats (among others: LIRC, Wave, Pronto Classic and professional, and different text based formats; not only from files, but also from the clipboard, from URLs, and from file hierarchies), as well as the Internet IR Databases by Global Caché and by IRDB.
Imported signals can be decoded, analyzed, edited, and plotted. A collection of IR signal can thus be assembled and edited, and finally exported in one of the many supported formats.
The program contains the powerful IrpTransmogrifier IR-renderer, which means that almost all IR protocols known to the Internet community can be generated.
Many bugfixes and enhancements. Uses LTS IrpTransmogrifier 1.2.14.
Many bugfixes and enhancements. Uses LTS IrpTransmogrifier 1.2.13.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/bengtmartensson/IrScrutinizer/compare/Version-2.4.0...Version-2.4.1
Many changes and bug fixes. Uses LTS IrpTransmogrifier 1.2.11.
Contained files:

_Update 2023-08-21, for Linux and /dev/lirc: Unfortunately, this build contains [a broken DevSlashLirc](https://github.com/bengtmartensson/IrScrutinizer/issues/492). If this is a concern for you, please use the [snapshot](https://github.com/bengtmartensson/IrScrutinizer/releases/tag/ci-build)._
Release notes: ```Version 2.4.0, released 2022-12-20.

ul.li: Documentation improvements. #269.
Fix HardwareManager.close() misbehavior when called during shutdown. #463.
IrWidget: Add option for not dropping DTR and RTS when opening the device. #462.
Uses IrpTransmogrifier 1.2.11, see IrpTransmogrifier.releasenotes.txt.
Option for reporting all decodes, corresponding to decode --all in IrpTransmogrifier. #457.
Remove incomplete HTTP proxy support. #456.
Some export formats erroneously case sensitive wrt protocol name. #453.
Default name ("remote") in MetaDataDialog.
New name transformations in Parametric Remote: lowercase, uppercase, capitilize. #447.
Updated export formats Lirc.
New command line option --loglevel, cf. IrpTransmogrifier.
Exportformats: better handling of export format parameters. Implemented export formats documentation. #323.
Some layout tweaks. #366, #401.
Remove Lirc as sending device (partially replaced by NamedCommandSender). #399.
Remove IrTrans support (except for the NamedCommandSender).
Remove explicit IrToy sending/capturing support (in Linux, still indirectly supported through DevSlashLirc).
Intervals in Render/F, S, F, etc now parsed correctly. #437.
Remove "LIRC Mode 2" as capturing device. #378.
Redesign hardware configuration and selection. #281.
New tool for sending named commands "Named Command Sender". #128.```

description.p: Minor changes and bug fixes. Uses LTS IrpTransmogrifier 1.2.10.
### Contained files:
This release uses [NRJavaSerial](https://github.com/NeuronRobotics/nrjavaserial) instead of RXTX. Also, most serial hardware has been reworked. There is also a number of bugfixes and improvements.
### Contained files:
### Contained files:
This is the first version after 2.1.0. (The gap is due to the wish of keeping the version number compatible with IrpTransmogrifier).
### Contained files:
Minor improvements and bug fixes. Uses IrpTransmogrifier 1.1.0, Girr 2.1.0.
Finally, Version 2, called 2.0.1 (there has never been a 2.0.0).

This release is the "second final" 1.x.y release; based on IrpMaster as rendering engine and DecodeIR as decoding engine. Further releases will be based on IrpTransmogrifier instead, and will be numbered 2.x.y. (see #212).
In comparision with 1.4.2 there are some rather important bugfixes. Also, the HTTP-functions can now optionally use a proxy.

This release is the final 1.x.y release; based on IrpMaster as rendering engine and DecodeIR as decoding engine. Further releases will be based on IrpTransmogrifier instead, and will be numbered 2.x.y. (see #212).
[IrScrutinizer.releasenotes.txt](https://github.com/bengtmartensson/harctoolboxbundle/files/2342546/IrScrutinizer.releasenotes.txt)
A few minor bug fixes and improvements.
Second try; fixed #186
The latest and greatest version!
The latest and greatest version!
Many improvements and bug fixes. See IrScrutinizer.releasenotes.txt

New functionality: Support for the CommandFusion learner. Import of CML (RTI) files (like the Glackowitz' Megalist). A number of small improvements and bug fixes. See IrScrutinizer.releasenotes.txt for the full list.

ul.li: This build fixes two issues that were found to be present with v3.2.16.
It also fixes a bug in loading an XSight device upgrade into a non-XSight remote setup.
